reasoning: Addressing lactate clearance: Your 9.3% power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts points directly to poor lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. The last ride was at a lower intensity; now it's time to step up the effort. The Alpine Loop climb demands strong aerobic endurance while clearing lactate efficiently during sustained efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12-minute over-unders: 2 min at 242W, 2 min at 218W, repeat. Short recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: close the 5-to-20 gap with over-unders and Zone 2 base work.
